all.en: Preliminary Audit Findings Report — Fiscal Year 2025 External Review
all.zh: 初步稽核發現報告 — 2025 財年外部審查

all.en: Prepared by: Whitman & Hayes Independent Auditors, LLP
all.zh: 編製單位：Whitman & Hayes 獨立稽核師事務所

all.en: Submitted to: Chief Financial Officer and Audit Committee
all.zh: 呈送對象：財務長及稽核委員會

all.en: Section One: Executive Summary of Preliminary Observations
all.zh: 第一節：初步觀察結果之執行摘要

all.en: The external audit team has concluded the fieldwork phase as of November 30th.
all.zh: 外部稽核團隊已於 11 月 30 日完成現場稽核階段。

all.en: Six material findings have been identified for management response.
all.zh: 已辨識出六項重大發現，待管理階層回應。

all.en: No findings rise to the level of restatement of prior period financials.
all.zh: 尚無發現需重編前期財務報表之程度。

all.en: However, three findings warrant immediate remediation action.
all.zh: 惟其中三項發現需立即採取改善行動。

all.en: Finding 1: Revenue recognition timing for multi-year service contracts.
all.zh: 發現一：多年期服務合約之收入認列時點問題。

all.en: Several contracts recognized revenue upfront despite ongoing performance obligations.
all.zh: 部分合約在仍有後續履約義務情況下即提前認列收入。

all.en: The estimated overstatement equals 1.8 million dollars in the third quarter.
all.zh: 第三季預估高估金額為一百八十萬美元。

all.en: Finding 2: Insufficient documentation for inventory valuation adjustments.
all.zh: 發現二：存貨評價調整之佐證文件不足。

all.en: Quarterly write-down memos lack supporting market data for slow-moving items.
all.zh: 季度沖減備忘錄就滯銷品項欠缺市場資料佐證。

all.en: Finding 3: Weak segregation of duties in the accounts payable cycle.
all.zh: 發現三：應付帳款循環之職務分工不足。

all.en: The same staff member can both create vendors and approve payments.
all.zh: 同一名員工可同時建立供應商及核准付款。

all.en: Finding 4: Delayed bank reconciliations for two foreign subsidiary accounts.
all.zh: 發現四：兩家海外子公司帳戶之銀行對帳延宕。

all.en: Reconciliations exceeded the 30-day policy window in five of twelve months.
all.zh: 對帳作業於十二個月中有五個月超出 30 天政策時限。

all.en: Finding 5: Incomplete documentation of related party transactions.
all.zh: 發現五：關係人交易文件不完整。

all.en: Two transactions totaling 420,000 dollars lack independent pricing benchmarks.
all.zh: 兩筆合計四十二萬美元之交易欠缺獨立訂價參考。

all.en: Finding 6: Manual journal entry controls require enhancement.
all.zh: 發現六：人工分錄之控制作業需強化。

all.en: Approximately 12 percent of entries lack secondary review evidence.
all.zh: 約 12% 之分錄缺乏複核紀錄佐證。

all.en: Section Two: Meeting Discussion and Initial Response Plan
all.zh: 第二節：會議討論及初步回應計畫

all.en: The CFO convened an internal meeting on December 2nd at 10 AM.
all.zh: 財務長於 12 月 2 日上午 10 點召開內部會議。

all.en: Attendees included the Controller, Internal Audit, and Legal Counsel.
all.zh: 出席者包括財務主計、內部稽核及法務顧問。

all.en: The CFO emphasized the importance of timely and credible remediation.
all.zh: 財務長強調及時且具公信力之改善至為重要。

all.en: Management does not contest the substantive findings as presented.
all.zh: 管理階層未對所列實質發現提出異議。

all.en: However, the team will clarify scope and quantification for Finding 1.
all.zh: 惟團隊將就發現一之範圍與金額予以釐清。

all.en: A formal response letter is due to the auditors within fifteen business days.
all.zh: 應於十五個工作天內提交正式回應函予稽核師。

all.en: Each finding will be assigned a remediation owner and target completion date.
all.zh: 每項發現皆將指派改善負責人及預定完成日期。

all.en: Finding 1 will be owned by the Director of Revenue Operations.
all.zh: 發現一由收入維運總監負責。

all.en: Finding 2 will be owned by the Head of Supply Chain Finance.
all.zh: 發現二由供應鏈財務主管負責。

all.en: Finding 3 will be owned by the Accounts Payable Manager.
all.zh: 發現三由應付帳款經理負責。

all.en: Finding 4 will be owned by the Treasury Operations Lead.
all.zh: 發現四由資金維運負責人主責。

all.en: Finding 5 will be owned by the General Counsel jointly with Finance.
all.zh: 發現五由法務長與財務部門共同負責。

all.en: Finding 6 will be owned by the Manager of Financial Reporting.
all.zh: 發現六由財務報導經理負責。

all.en: Status updates will be reported biweekly to the Audit Committee chair.
all.zh: 進度更新將每兩週呈報稽核委員會主席。

all.en: All findings are expected to be remediated within ninety days.
all.zh: 所有發現預計於九十日內改善完畢。

all.en: External counsel has been engaged for Finding 5 due to disclosure implications.
all.zh: 鑑於發現五涉及揭露事項，已委任外部法律顧問。

all.en: Materiality threshold for the engagement is set at 750,000 dollars.
all.zh: 本案重大性門檻訂為七十五萬美元。

all.en: Findings below this threshold are aggregated for summary disclosure.
all.zh: 低於此門檻之發現將彙整於摘要揭露中。

all.en: Aggregated immaterial findings total 310,000 dollars and pose no concern.
all.zh: 彙整之非重大發現合計三十一萬美元，未引起疑慮。

all.en: Section Three: Process Improvements and Long-Term Controls Roadmap
all.zh: 第三節：流程改善及長期控制路徑圖

all.en: The internal controls roadmap will be refreshed for FY2026.
all.zh: 內部控制路徑圖將於 2026 財年予以更新。

all.en: Investments in automation are expected to reduce manual error exposure.
all.zh: 投資自動化預期可降低人為錯誤風險。

all.en: A new continuous auditing tool will be piloted in the second quarter.
all.zh: 新版持續性稽核工具將於第二季試行。

all.en: The tool monitors transaction anomalies in near real time.
all.zh: 該工具可近乎即時監控交易異常。

all.en: Training sessions will be scheduled for all finance personnel.
all.zh: 將為全體財務人員安排教育訓練。

all.en: Mandatory refresher courses cover SOX, fraud awareness, and ethics.
all.zh: 必修複訓課程涵蓋 SOX、舞弊辨識及倫理規範。

all.en: Completion of training will be tracked through the learning management system.
all.zh: 訓練完成情形將透過學習管理系統追蹤。

all.en: Section Four: Next Steps and Reporting Cadence
all.zh: 第四節：後續步驟與報告節奏

all.en: The final audit report is targeted for issuance in late February.
all.zh: 最終稽核報告預定於 2 月下旬發布。

all.en: A debrief with the Audit Committee is scheduled for March 4th.
all.zh: 與稽核委員會之檢討會議排定於 3 月 4 日。

all.en: Public disclosure considerations will be reviewed with Investor Relations.
all.zh: 公開揭露相關考量將與投資人關係部門共同檢視。

all.en: Confidentiality of preliminary findings must be strictly maintained.
all.zh: 初步發現之保密性須嚴格維持。

all.en: End of Preliminary Findings Report, document reference AFR-2025-PRE-04.
all.zh: 初步發現報告完畢，文件編號 AFR-2025-PRE-04。
